title: Old Spanish Customers
writer: Syd Courtenay, Edwin Greenwood, Lola Harvey
actors: Leslie Fuller, Binnie Barnes, Drusilla Wills
plot: Bill, a bumbling, dim-witted fellow and his shrewish wife win a holiday to Spain at a Whist tournament. Along the way, he and a famous Matador named Tormito get into an altercation, leaving Bill in the bullfighter's clothes. Seper...
